sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value INT, description VARCHAR(100));

INSERT INTO test_data (id, name, value, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample 1', 10, 'First Entry'), (2, 'Sample 2', NULL, 'Second Entry'), (3, 'Sample 3', 255, 'Third Entry'), (4, 'Sample 4', 0, 'Fourth Entry');
SELECT id, replace(name, 'Sample', 'Test') AS updated_name, value >> 1 AS shifted_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, replace(description, 'Entry', '') AS modified_desc, value FROM test_data WHERE value >> 1 > 5;
UPDATE test_data SET description = replace(description, '  ', '') WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS entry_count FROM (SELECT id, replace(name, 'Sample', 'Test') FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS sub_query GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT id, replace(name, 'Sample ', 'Test ') || ' with shift ' || (value >> 1) AS transformed FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL);

SELECT id, (SELECT replace(description, 'Entry', 'Item') FROM test_data AS inner_table WHERE inner_table.id = test_data.id) AS new_description FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value >> 1 < 10;
SELECT id, replace(name, 'Sample', 'Test') AS new_name, value FROM (SELECT id, name, value >> 2 AS value FROM test_data) AS temp WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tmp_data AS SELECT id, replace(name, 'Sample', 'Example') AS updated_name FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT tmp.id, tmp.updated_name, replace(tmp.updated_name, 'Example', 'Test Example') AS final_name FROM tmp_data AS tmp;
